name: nexu-motion
description: Local, key-free image generation workflows, audio editing, readable typography, caption timing, and motion graphics for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Edit audio and render readable motion graphics locally.
interface.longDescription: Nexu Motion lets Codex generate original visual layers, clean and edit voiceovers, rebuild word-timed captions, create minimal editorial typography, preview frames, and render MP4 videos locally. It needs no separate external AI API key.
interface.defaultPrompt: Clean this audio, remove unwanted sections, rebuild the captions, and create a synchronized motion graphic.
